name: Apricot Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crust ingredients until crumbly and pack into a heavily greased 10x15x1 inch pan. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and set aside.
2. Cook the apricots in water for 10 minutes, then drain, cool, and set aside.
3. Mix the eggs with brown sugar. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir into the egg mixture. Blend in vanilla, nuts, and apricots.
4. Spread the topping over the crust and bake at 350°F for approximately 30 minutes.
5. Cool completely. Cut into 1 1/2 inch squares.
6. Roll in powdered sugar.
